reforms.description: Norway has implemented selective industrial support measures, including funding for research and development, to bolster key sectors of the economy.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By providing funding for research and development, the initiative aims to enhance innovation and competitiveness in key industries, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The budget for research and development funding has been allocated and is in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant investment in R&D, which is crucial for fostering innovation in the industrial sector, although it is not a complete overhaul of the existing system.
reforms.source_quote: Research and development funding has been allocated to support specific branches of industry.
